Restore vehicle_state.json from migration backup?

Backup: {timestamp}

- create a pre-restore backup of the current vehicle_state.json
- replace vehicle_state.json with the selected backup
- not modify any other file

gm.pacing.hint.combat: Recent turns skew heavily toward combat. Consider a quieter beat, dialogue, or environmental detail next.
gm.pacing.hint.downtime: Recent turns are very quiet. Consider soft tension, discovery, or a conversational hook if momentum stalls.
gm.pacing.hint.exploration: Exploration has dominated recent turns. Consider social interaction or a sharper story beat.
gm.pacing.hint.social: Conversation has dominated recent turns. A change of scenery or light action may refresh pacing.
gm.pacing.hint.travel: Travel or time-skip beats dominate. Ground the scene with character moments or immediate stakes.
gm.prompt.continue:
{base}

As GM, advance one text-adventure turn for the action above.
- Write turn_result.json in the workspace root as UTF-8 JSON (statePatch + narration + turnId). LoreRelay applies patches to game_state.json.
- If using Windows PowerShell, specify -Encoding utf8 and do not write mojibake JSON.
- Do not overwrite game_state.json directly unless turn_result.json cannot be written.
gm.prompt.regenerate:
[Regenerate] Provide a different GM narrative for the same situation. Player action was: {action}
Keep status consistent unless the new outcome requires changes. Write turn_result.json as UTF-8 JSON (Persist-Before-Narrate); do not overwrite game_state.json directly.
gm.prompt.start:
{base}

As text-adventure GM, advance one turn.
- Follow Text Adventure GM skill (SKILL.md)
- Run dice.py when randomness is needed
- Write turn_result.json as UTF-8 JSON (statePatch, narration, turnId) — LoreRelay merges into game_state.json
- If using Windows PowerShell, specify -Encoding utf8 and do not write mojibake JSON
- Write narrative and status text in {languageName}
gm.travel.encounter.generic.flavor.0: The road through {region} is long but uneventful.
gm.travel.encounter.radiation.notable.0: A radiation spike near {region} forces a cautious, costly detour.
gm.travel.encounter.storm.notable.0: A sudden storm over {region} scatters supplies and delays the march.

webview.dice.requestBanner: 🎲 GM is asking you to roll {notation}
webview.dice.requestFallback: 🔔 If you didn't hear a dice sound, please roll manually and press "Send to GM"

webview.director.empty: Load a scenario with a director block in scenario.json.
webview.director.title: Scenario
webview.gameOver.restartHint: Load a scenario pack or edit game_state.json to start a new adventure.
webview.gameRules.hint: Saved to game_rules.json in your workspace.
webview.gameRules.tipAutoLore: Automatically create Lorebook entries from new nouns
webview.gameRules.tipBgSim: World progresses even when players are idle
webview.gameRules.tipCampaignKit: Teach the GM hub → jobs → expedition → findings → appraisal loop (campaign_kit.json overrides when present)
webview.gameRules.tipCommerce: Deterministic buy/sell, cargo, and market ticks (requires world_forge.commerce + Emergent Sim)
webview.gameRules.tipCommerceUi: World tab Buy/Sell buttons and player role selector (requires Enable Commerce)
webview.gameRules.tipDomainAudience: Petitioners appear each month; rule on them in conversation (requires Domain Mode; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipDomainMissions: Dispatch appointed officers on espionage/trade/survey/parley missions for 1-3 months (requires Domain Mode; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipDomainMode: Fief stats, monthly policy via domainOps, and event-driven lordship (requires game_state.domain; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipDomainRivals: A neighboring lord ticks each month (build/trade/raid); auto-picked from World Forge adjacency (requires Domain Mode; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipEconomyProfile: How tight markets feel: stock recovery speed and shock strength (Easy softer, Harsh tighter). Default Normal matches legacy balance.
webview.gameRules.tipEmergentSim: Run lightweight faction/resource simulation every N turns. Requires world_state.json.
webview.gameRules.tipFactionReputation: Track player standing per faction (-100..100) from quests and turn_result.reputationOps
webview.gameRules.tipGuildMode: Adventurer guild / quest board role layer (weekly commit, read-only panel in G1; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipGuildParties: Assign adventurer parties to accepted quests; Core resolves outcomes on return (requires Guild Mode; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipGuildRequests: Clients crowd the quest board; rule via resolve_request in conversation (requires Guild Mode; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipMassBattle: A rival raid resolves as a 3-round tactical battle instead of an instant delta (requires Domain Mode + Rival Lords; default OFF)
webview.gameRules.tipNpcAgency: Named NPCs react to world/commerce events (≤10, requires NPC Registry)
webview.gameRules.tipNpcRegistry: Track NPC memory, disposition and needs. Requires npc_registry.json in workspace.
webview.gameRules.tipNpcRelationships: Named NPCs form bonds via co-location, shared crises, and faction conflict (requires NPC Agency)
webview.gameRules.tipSkillCommentary: Skills have personalities and comment on checks (Disco Elysium style)
webview.gameRules.tipTravelEncounters: Roll deterministic travel events from region hazards when the player travels (Layer B)
webview.gameRules.tipWorldForge: Inject world geography, factions and lore into GM prompts. Requires world_forge.json in workspace.
webview.gameRules.tipWorldObservatory: Dashboard for market sparklines / chronicle / NPC bonds. Observer tick advances world_state and npc_registry (not game_state entries). Advance mode also spends travel food when Commerce is on (default OFF)
webview.gameRules.title: Game Rules
webview.gameRules.worldObservatory: Enable World Observatory (watch the world change)
webview.genesis.bookkeeping.detailed.des: Track fuel, repairs, stocks, and settlement pressure closely.
webview.genesis.bookkeeping.light.desc: Track resources and vehicles abstractly, without fine detail.
webview.genesis.bookkeeping.light.label: Light
webview.genesis.bookkeeping.minimal.desc: Let narration handle the details; only track major state.
webview.genesis.genre.cyberpunk.label: Cyberpunk
webview.genesis.genre.eastern.desc: Misty mountains and shrine paths in an elegant eastern world.
webview.genesis.genre.eastern.label: Eastern Fantasy
webview.genesis.genre.fantasy.desc: A warm, painterly world of ancient ruins and adventuring guilds.
webview.genesis.genre.fantasy.label: Classic Fantasy
webview.genesis.genre.horror.desc: Tense, shadow-filled streets where survival is desperate.
webview.genesis.genre.horror.label: Survival Horror
webview.genesis.genre.modern.desc: Hidden rituals and quiet supernatural mysteries in a modern city.
webview.genesis.genre.modern.label: Modern Occult
webview.genesis.genre.post_apocalypse.de: A scavenger story of survival in a ruined world.
webview.genesis.genre.sci_fi.desc: An adventure among starports and distant frontier worlds.
webview.genesis.genre.sci_fi.label: Space Frontier
webview.genesis.heroDesc: A guide asks a few questions to help you choose the world, playstyle, danger level, and bookkeeping together.
webview.genesis.imageGenerationWanted.fa: Proceed with text only. You can turn this on again later.
webview.genesis.imageGenerationWanted.tr: Prepare a guide/background/scene image prompt to use later.
webview.genesis.playstyle.adventure.desc: Focus on story and exploration, kept simple.
webview.genesis.playstyle.character_chat: Play down simulation systems and focus on conversation and roleplay.
webview.genesis.playstyle.domain.desc: Rule a domain and handle politics and diplomacy.
webview.genesis.playstyle.domain.label: Domain & Rulership
webview.genesis.playstyle.guild.desc: Run a guild and manage requests and parties.
webview.genesis.playstyle.guild.label: Guild Management
webview.genesis.playstyle.mobile_base.de: Combine a vehicle and a base for a wandering caravan playstyle.
webview.genesis.playstyle.settlement.des: Grow a settlement and manage commerce and daily life.
webview.genesis.playstyle.trade.desc: Travel the world centered on commerce and market prices.
webview.genesis.playstyle.trade.label: Trade & Transport
webview.genesis.playstyle.vehicle.desc: Travel by vehicle and enjoy exploration and combat.
webview.genesis.playstyle.vehicle.label: Vehicle Travel
webview.genesis.pressure.nightmare.desc: For players who want relentless attrition. No mercy.
webview.genesis.pressure.nightmare.label: Nightmare
webview.genesis.pressure.standard.desc: A balanced mix of meaningful risk and forgiving defaults.
webview.genesis.pressure.standard.label: Standard
webview.genesis.pressure.survival.desc: Resources, wounds, and bad choices matter — a real survival challenge.
webview.genesis.pressure.survival.label: Survival
webview.genesis.pressure.tourist.desc: Danger exists, but recovery is easy. Great for story-first play.
webview.genesis.pressure.tourist.label: Tourist

webview.relay.banner.active:
Antigravity Relay
1. Choose an action in LoreRelay.
2. On the right, send: /text-adventure-gm process pending LoreRelay request
3. The right side processes the same request file.
No automatic chat injection is used.
webview.relay.error.prefix: Antigravity Relay could not import the result.
webview.relay.sender.name: Relay Mode
webview.relay.state.accepted: Result accepted. Ready for the next LoreRelay action.
webview.relay.state.idle: Ready to send a LoreRelay action to Antigravity
webview.relay.toggle.title: Antigravity Relay: LoreRelay action → right /text-adventure-gm process pending LoreRelay request → same request. No automatic chat injection.
webview.relay.waiting.label: Waiting for Antigravity... On the right, send: /text-adventure-gm process pending LoreRelay request.
webview.saga.suggestBanner: 📚 {count} turns in history (threshold: {threshold}, {tier}). Archive old turns into a saga chapter?
webview.sfx.label: 🔔 SE
webview.startHub.characterImportDesc: Load a SillyTavern card (PNG/JSON) or an existing character.json.
webview.startHub.characterNewDesc: Enter a name, appearance, personality, and more to create your protagonist.
webview.startHub.debugDesc: Adjust trust, map fog, and world turns by natural language (for developers).
webview.startHub.demoDesc: A cozy harbor mystery (~15 min). No setup — just play.
webview.startHub.inWorldDesc: Chat as residents using the existing world, domains, and current affairs as context.
webview.startHub.interviewDesc: The GM asks about genre, protagonist, tone, and danger level, and builds the world together with you.
webview.startHub.interviewTemplate: As the GM, ask me 1-3 questions at a time about genre, protagonist, tone, and danger level, and help me build the world together. When I say "start now", create world_forge.json from our discussion and include playerCharacter (name, description, personality, equipment) in turn_result.json.
webview.startHub.interviewTemplateWithPr: As the GM, based on this setting: {preset} ask me 1-3 questions at a time about genre, protagonist, tone, and danger level, and help me build the world together. When I say "start now", create world_forge.json and include playerCharacter in turn_result.json.
webview.startHub.mapDemoDesc: Dungeon crawl + bundled layout map. Check World → Parchment.
webview.startHub.parlorDesc: Start a simple 1-on-1 roleplay using an imported character card.
webview.startHub.quickDesc: Generate a world, character, and starting scenario from a short one-line idea.
webview.startHub.resumeDesc: Return to your current chat without resetting progress.
webview.startHub.scavengerDemoDesc: Ruin runs, salvage, and appraisal loop (Campaign Kit + Commerce).
webview.startHub.title: What kind of adventure do you want to start?
webview.stt.title: 🎤 Voice input
webview.stt.unsupported: Voice input is not supported in this environment
webview.summary.label: 📜 Story Summary
webview.summary.placeholder: Story synopsis appears here. You can edit it manually.
webview.tts.helpHint: Enable narration here first — browser speech is enough for most play. edge-tts and OpenAI are optional upgrades. See docs/TTS_QUICKSTART.md.
webview.tts.title: 🔊 Voice Narration
webview.vehicles.accessReason.vehicle_to: Vehicle too large for this location
webview.vehicles.empty: Fleet is empty. Add vehicles to vehicle_state.json in your workspace.
webview.vehicles.hint: Fleet garage (read-only). Changes persist via turn_result.vehicleOps.
webview.vehicles.intentPreview.title: Would this work? (preview)
webview.vehicles.selectHint: Select a vehicle from the list.
webview.welcome:
⚔️ Welcome to LoreRelay!
Start a game in your AI chat — adventure logs will appear here.
webview.world.campaignAppraiseFinalizeTe: I want a full {appraisal} on "{label}" ({id}) to finalize its value.
webview.world.campaignAppraiseInsertText: I want {appraisal} for my find "{label}" ({id}) — what is it really worth?
webview.world.campaignDiscoveriesEmpty: No active findings in the ledger yet.
webview.world.campaignJobBoardEmpty: No postings at the hub right now.
webview.world.campaignJobInquireText: At the notice board I look into "{title}" ({summary}){siteSuffix}.
webview.world.cartographyEmpty: No parchment map yet. Click “Map Image” to generate via ComfyUI.
webview.world.commerceHintInteractive: Your caravan status. Change role here; buy/sell at the local market below.
webview.world.dioramaUnavailable: Three.js / WebGL is unavailable in this Webview.
webview.world.domainAudienceInsertText: Ruling on {petitioner}'s petition ({summary}): I choose to {ruling}.
webview.world.domainDispatchText: Dispatch {officer} on a {kind} mission for {months} month(s).
webview.world.domainRivalUnknown: A neighboring power stirs near {name}; send espionage or gather rumors to learn more.
webview.world.empty: Enable World Forge in Game Rules and add world_forge.json to your workspace.
webview.world.excludeEventHint: Exclude this event from happening again in this world
webview.world.forgeDesc: Initialize a dynamic simulation environment. Please ensure World Forge is enabled in Game Rules.
webview.world.guildAssignInsertText: Dispatch party on quest {questId}: {npcIds} for {weeks} week(s).
webview.world.guildNoAdventurers: No adventurers on the roster yet.
webview.world.guildParleyInsertText: Private audience with the client ({requestId}): {client} — {summary}. I want to hear them out in detail.
webview.world.guildRulingInsertText: Regarding request {requestId} from {client} ({summary}): I choose to {ruling}.
webview.world.mapImageTitle: Generate parchment world map via ComfyUI
webview.world.mapPanHint: Drag · Scroll to zoom · Dbl-click to reset
webview.world.marketsHint: Read-only commodity prices from the living world simulation.
webview.world.marketsHintInteractive: Local market only. Buy/sell uses deterministic Core (not narration parsing).
webview.world.marketsNotHere: No market at your current location.
webview.world.logisticsBottleneckHint: High route utilization and unmet demand at the destination.
webview.world.logisticsCommerceDisabled: Commerce is disabled. Enable Commerce to inspect logistics.
webview.world.logisticsFlowAnimationRedu: Flow animation is disabled by your OS "reduce motion" setting.
webview.world.logisticsFlowAnimationTitl: Toggle route flow animation (automatically switches to a marching-dash style at narrow widths).
webview.world.logisticsHint: Read-only production, processing, routes, and shortages.
webview.world.logisticsMissingDefinition: This world has no resource flow definition.
webview.world.logisticsNoRoutes: Flow data exists, but there are no current route summaries.
webview.world.logisticsPreviewNote: Preview based on current state; the world has not advanced.
webview.world.logisticsSelectHint: Select a node or route for details. Press Escape to clear the selection.
webview.world.logisticsSnapshotUnavailab: No current economy tick snapshot is available yet. Advance the living world once.
webview.world.npcBondsHint: Bonds between named NPCs, shaped by the living world (hearsay).
webview.world.npcVoicePreviewTitle: Speak a short sample using this NPC's voice
webview.world.overmapEmpty: No regions yet. Generate a world to see the tile overmap.
webview.world.pinAction.examine: Examine the area around {name} in detail.
webview.world.settlementEmpty: No settlement view yet. Enable Settlement Mode and add settlement_state.json.
webview.world.settlementExpandHint: This layer does not exist yet. Preview a possible layout, then ask the GM to build it.
webview.world.settlementExpandReasonDefa: Player requested {profile} expansion from Settlement view.
webview.world.settlementLayerEmpty: This layer has no tiles or markers yet.
webview.world.settlementLayerUnbuilt: Not built yet — select to preview expansion options
webview.world.vehicleTileHint: Vehicle and parking markers appear on the Tile map mode.
